messages.text: Circling back on this — still need the updated vendor list before I can close accruals. EOD today please.
Hey D — Q2 vendor accruals are mostly tied out, two items pending banking confirmation. Will have the full schedule to you by Thurs. One ACH change came in I'm validating before we book it.

Mike we need to decide on Dad's place. Naperville Memory Gardens has one opening left and they won't hold it past next week. I can't keep doing the 6am check-ins and the meds alone. I need you on this.

I hear you. But 9k a month is not nothing on my end either — daycare alone is 2400 and we just bought the house. I'm not saying no. I'm saying I need a few days to look at the numbers before we lock anything. Don't make me the bad guy here.
thx for catching the FX line. fix it and re-send, I'll review on mobile

Sorry about yesterday. You're carrying more than me and I know it. Let's tour Memory Gardens — book the one you flagged and I'll fly in if I can. We'll figure out the cost split, I promise it won't all land on you.
saw it, approved. one sec — making breakfast 🙏
Board deck on track for Monday — variance bridge and ARR walk done, just finalizing the burn-multiple slide. Want me to pre-read it with you Sun night or Mon 8am?

Hi Rachel — confirming Friday 11am works on my end. Same number. Looking forward to hearing where Arclight landed. Please keep everything to this address, work calendar is shared. Thanks again for moving this along.
ok. ship it
Arclight final round is next week man. Honestly nervous. Comp looks right but if this leaks before I sign I'm done at Nimbus. You and Allison are the only two who know. Don't even like typing it.
added to Groceries — diapers (Nora), Caleb's lunchbox snacks, oat milk. grabbing on the way home so you don't have to. ❤️
Thank you, Michael — your annual gift of $250 to St. Jude Children's Research Hospital has been received. Your receipt for tax purposes is attached.
Sunday: I've got Caleb's soccer at 9, can you take Nora to your folks? Then swap so you make the 1pm. I might need an hour Fri morning blocked — PT for the knee. 👍
Deck's ready for 9am — final version in the shared Drive folder, link in your inbox. Holler if you want changes before then.
On it — pulling the vendor reforecast now, will have v2 in #finance-leadership by EOD.
Confirmed, Tom & Patty have the kids tonight 🙏 I might be on the close late, don't wait up. Love you.
Can we line up that facility tour for Dad? Just want to see the place before we talk numbers. No pressure on him yet — let's keep it quiet until we've actually looked.

Al, $9k/mo is not something I can just absorb right now, you know my situation. I'm not saying no, I'm saying let's not fight about the split before we've even toured. Can we please just talk after the tour?
Arclight final round has me wound up man. Haven't told anyone but you and Al. If this leaks at Nimbus before I have ink on paper I'm cooked. Keep it in the vault.
Heads down on the forecast this morning — slacking off DMs til ~11. Ping the analysts for anything urgent. 👍
Rachel — that round felt good, genuinely. What do next steps look like on comp? Trying to understand base/RSU split before I take this further. Please keep everything to this address only.
Okay — I think the one we toured is the one. Let's shortlist it. We still need to sort the cost-split but at least we agree on the place. Progress.
Had a genuinely good week at work for once. Tell you more later. Things might be looking up. ❤️
Might actually have to make a real decision soon. Two doors open and I can't tell anyone at Nimbus. Stomach's been in knots all week honestly.
Confirmed for Mon 9am 👍 I'll have the close variance and the vendor ACH reconciliation ready. One flag on the Q2 audit list but nothing that can't wait til we sync.

Hi Rachel — before I let Arclight move to paper, can we get Vellum to firm up that verbal? I don't want to walk into written terms with only one real number on the table. Comfortable saying that to them directly. Still keeping all of this very quiet on my end.

Mike — good news, Vellum just confirmed the verbal is firm at the number we discussed. So you now effectively have two live. Arclight is ready to send paper this week. Want to talk through how we play them against each other? Calendly Fri 11am.

I'm here every week Mike. I'm the one driving him to the neuro appts. If we're doing memory care it has to be 60/40 and you know that's still generous given who actually shows up. I can't keep carrying this alone.

Talked it through — leaning Arclight, the role's the better fit. But I want one more turn on comp before I commit, the base is fine but the equity is light vs the vesting I'm walking away from. Can you push once more? Then I'm ready to move.
Landed, grabbing a cab to dad's now. Front door code still the same? Kiss the kids. Long week 🙏
Here 9am tomorrow. Let's just walk the place together before we fight about money again. I want to get this right for him.
Tell Caleb I'm so sorry I'm missing soccer. Promise I'll be at the next one. Send me a video? Feel terrible I'm not there.

$9k a month Mike. I can't float 40% of that on an RN salary and you know it. You make almost four times what I do. This isn't about who's 'there more' — it's about who can actually pay. We can't keep stalling, the bed opens in three weeks.
Tour actually went well, place is decent and the staff seem kind. Cost thing with Allie still not settled, it got tense. Flying back tomorrow. I'm wiped. Love you.

Okay. Tentatively yes on Arclight — I'll accept pending final written terms. Once the offer letter's in hand I'll start thinking about timing on my side. Please keep this fully confidential until I've signed; it cannot get back to anyone here.
morning — I can grab Caleb from soccer Tue and Thurs this week, Jen has me till 6 anyway. You taking Wed? sorry, brain's mush, didn't sleep
hey — any word on the written from Arclight's side? trying not to refresh my inbox every ten minutes lol. happy to nudge if it helps
opening now — give me an hour, in back-to-backs and can't read it properly on my phone. will call you on the alias after
man it's real. written's in hand. I'm shaking a little ngl. don't say anything to anyone — not the group, not even hypothetically. you and Allison are the only two who know
can you buy me 48 to respond? I want to do this right. and honestly — is there any way to put Vellum next to it? not to play games, just so I walk in with a number I can live with
ok. Dad's place is decided, I toured it Thursday, he goes end of month. but Mike we HAVE to settle the split now, I can't keep fronting deposits on an RN salary while you sit on RSUs

60/40 isn't me being greedy. I drive there every week. I do the doctor calls. you have the POA and a director title.
[outgoing] Al I'm not arguing the work, I'm saying 50/50 is what's fair on paper and I'm stretched thinner than you think right now
[incoming] thinner than ME?
I'm coming to Caleb's game Saturday. blocking it, phone off, no laptop. I mean it this time. I missed the recital and I still feel sick about it

you set your flex yet? start Dlo, Mahomes is a trap this week.
…anyway. leaning yes on Arclight. 90% there. just need to not blow it up before there's ink

hey. so — there's something I've been working on for a few months and I should've told you sooner. the offer's good. really good. we should talk tonight after the kids are down. it's nothing bad, I promise

thank you for not being mad I sat on it. ok so: base is up 28, the RSU cliff is the only thing I'm leaving on the table, ~8 months out. mortgage still works if I time the resignation after, not before. I just didn't want to scare you with a maybe
need the Q2 forecast cut before EOD — board prep. ping me when it's in. D
works — let's lock the Arclight start for the 1st. send the background-check forms to the personal email, NOT anything with nimbus on it. I'll do them tonight from home

calendar.summary: In-law kid handoff (Tue) — coordinate w/ Jen
